<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Profanity; /** * @internal */ class Validator { /** * Validates that the specified languages exist in the profanities directory. * * @param array<string>|null $languages * @return array<int, string> List of languages that don't exist */ public static function validateLanguages(?array $languages): array { if ($languages === null) { return []; } $profanitiesDir = __DIR__.'/Config/profanities'; $invalidLanguages = []; foreach ($languages as $language) { $specificLanguage = "$profanitiesDir/$language.php"; if (! file_exists($specificLanguage)) { $invalidLanguages[] = $language; } } return $invalidLanguages; } }
